title: Check My Bill
description: Enter a utility bill, compare it against the PURC tariff, and see solar coverage.

steps.title: Enter your bill
steps.description: Type the amount from your latest electricity bill.
steps.voiceScript: Enter the amount on your latest electricity bill.
steps.captionText: Enter the amount on your latest electricity bill.
steps.fallbackMessage: Enter your bill: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Check it
steps.description: We invert the PURC tariff to find your true consumption.
steps.voiceScript: We compare it against the current PURC tariff to find your real consumption.
steps.captionText: We compare it against the current PURC tariff to find your real consumption.
steps.fallbackMessage: Check it: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Solar coverage
steps.description: How much of that bill a solar design would remove.
steps.voiceScript: The result shows how much of the bill solar would cover.
steps.captionText: The result shows how much of the bill solar would cover.
steps.fallbackMessage: Solar coverage: not visible on this screen yet.
